_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》第004集(arc-01/004)。头钩=E03尾钩:诊断揭晓=失忆。她经小桃解释才懂'失忆'=保命符(不会中文也说得通),松口气;但顾晏辞眯眼起疑'连母语都忘?',尾钩:拿纸笔来→写字自证(E05危机)。连戏:女主躺床红嫁衣;医生灰白发深灰西装不露脸;小桃=薄荷绿蕾丝吊带上衣+白短裙(两件套全身照,render-rules 2:吊带+短裙非连衣裙,白细直腿,每集换配色);顾晏辞深炭西装。本集中文:失忆。逻辑:失忆一词她不懂→小桃解释后才懂→才有资格松口气;纸笔为常用词+情境可抓。头3秒钩子已强化(用户2026-07-16)。

shots.content: The tall coldly handsome young Chinese man in an impeccable dark charcoal suit stands by the grand carved bed listening intently with narrowed thoughtful eyes; in the blurred foreground the middle-aged doctor is seen only as a three-quarter BACK view with clearly SHORT GREY-WHITE salt-and-pepper hair and a dark grey suit shoulder, speaking solemnly, his face NOT visible; the corner of a red silk quilt visible at frame edge, NO other face; the young man is the only face in frame. Dim opulent mansion bedroom, morning lattice light. Cinematic medium shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Một câu bác sĩ, định đoạt sinh tử tôi

captions.pinyin: fū rén zhè shì shī yì
captions.local: Phu nhân bị… mất trí nhớ
Họ đều đang nhắc một từ này

shots.content: Full-body wide shot of the sweet young Chinese maid Xiao Tao with straight bangs and a low ponytail, very fair pale skin, slim slender figure — wearing a TWO-PIECE outfit: a pretty pale mint-green lace-trimmed spaghetti-strap camisole top (吊带) and a SEPARATE white pleated short skirt (短裙), NOT a one-piece dress, showing her very fair slim straight bare legs — standing completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure — leaning in to one side and whispering secretly behind her raised hand, eyes darting cautiously sideways, one finger of her other hand tapping her own temple in a 'forget everything' gesture, dim warm opulent bedroom, her whole body visible with feet on the floor in realistic proportion. Cinematic full-body shot. Landscape.

captions.pinyin: shī yì jiù shì quán wàng le
captions.local: Shī yì nghĩa là quên hết tất cả
Quên quá khứ, quên cả tiếng Trung
Đây chính là bùa cứu mạng của tôi

shots.content: The stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride lying against the pillows in the SAME long-sleeved ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery and modest high neckline, eyes gently closed, exhaling a quiet breath of relief with one hand pressed over her heart, the tension leaving her face, red silk quilt over her legs, soft warm morning light, fully clothed, single face in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Bùa hộ mệnh trên trời rơi xuống

captions.zh: 不会说中文，也说得通了
captions.local: Không biết tiếng Trung cũng hợp lý rồi

shots.content: Close-up of the tall coldly handsome young Chinese man in a dark charcoal suit, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure — eyes NARROWED in sharp suspicion, head tilted slightly, a cold skeptical half-smile at the corner of his mouth, gaze angled slightly past the camera, dim opulent mansion bedroom behind him. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.pinyin: shī yì lián mǔ yǔ dōu wàng le
captions.local: Mất trí nhớ? Đến tiếng mẹ đẻ cũng quên à

shots.content: Close-up of the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride sitting up against the pillows in the SAME long-sleeved ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, fully clothed with modest neckline, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure — her relieved expression collapsing into fresh dread, lips parted, brows knitted, wide fearful eyes angled slightly past the camera, fingers digging into the red silk quilt, warm dim light. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Giấy bút? Anh ta muốn tôi viết chữ

captions.zh: 可我一个汉字都不会写
captions.local: Nhưng tôi không biết viết chữ Hán nào
Nghe không hiểu còn giả được
không viết được chữ thì giả sao đây
